description_long: This is a vintage-style sedan with a long, rectangular body and pronounced tailfins, reminiscent of classic American cars from the mid-20th century. The exterior is primarily a rusty brown color with visible weathering and patches of discoloration, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The roof is slightly lighter, with a faded, almost oxidized appearance, and the windows are tinted blue. Chrome accents are visible on the front and rear bumpers, as well as around the windows, adding a touch of shine to the otherwise matte finish. The car features four doors, a spacious cabin, and a large trunk, typical of sedans from this era. The wheels are dark and partially obscured, but appear to be standard steel rims.
description: A weathered, vintage brown sedan with pronounced tailfins, chrome accents, and a faded roof, evoking classic mid-century American car design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chrome bumper, dual headlights, and the pointed hood with tailfins visible at the rear.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the car's long body, four-door configuration, and prominent tailfins at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide trunk, chrome rear bumper, and the tailfins extending upward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the length of the car and the weathered roof.
